brain.commentary: The council leans heavily toward long equity exposure with solid conviction on AAPL, GOOGL, SPY, QQQ and DIA, while the major tech names MSFT, AMZN and META are flat with negative composites and the crypto suite is uniformly flat and negative. Overall the portfolio tilts risk‑on on equities but the mixed signals and elevated vol in several positions (NVDA, TSLA, crypto) warrant a cautious stance. We keep the overall risk level near neutral (multiplier <1) and modestly adjust individual convictions to reinforce the strongest long ideas and temper the more fragile or negative‑alpha signals.
